title: Additional Node Helpers
description: Add @node_helper decorators to remaining helper functions in node_helpers.py so the exporter can substitute them automatically. Candidates: get_attr, int_op, switch_node/switch_int/switch_vec/switch_float, clamp01, smoother_step, create_node (generic), link_or_set. Also add new helpers for commonly repeated patterns: store_named_attribute, set_position, GeometryNodeCurvePrimitiveCircle, resample_curve.
definition-of-done: 1. All existing helper functions in node_helpers.py decorated with @node_helper. 2. New helpers added for top-5 most-repeated raw node patterns across armor code. 3. Exporter correctly substitutes all decorated helpers. 4. No regressions in existing exports.
testing-plan: Export each armor group (Neck, Blocker, Shoulders, Chest) with helpers enabled and verify substitution count increases. Validate geometry unchanged.
todos: DONE : Decorate get_attr with @node_helper (signature changed to group, dtype, name; all callers updated)
DONE : Decorate switch_node with @node_helper (only generic; switch_int/vec/float are thin wrappers)
SKIP : Decorate clamp01 and smoother_step — composite helpers (multiple math_ops), not 1:1 with a bl_idname
SKIP : Decorate create_node and link_or_set — generic utilities, not node-type-specific
DONE : Frequency analysis of raw nodes across all armor code to prioritize new helpers
DONE : Fix exporter prop_args quoting for non-string types (bool, int, float)
DONE : Full export regression test (Neck, Blocker, Shoulders, Chest) with helpers enabled
unknowns: RESOLVED: Top armor patterns — StoreNamedAttribute (~25), SetPosition (~25), CurvePrimitiveCircle (~30), ResampleCurve (~20)
RESOLVED: switch_* variants — only switch_node (generic) decorated; switch_int/vec/float are convenience wrappers that call it
changes-made: node_helpers.py: Decorated get_attr (signature reordered to group, dtype, name), int_op, switch_node with @node_helper
node_helpers.py: Added 4 new helpers — store_named_attribute, set_position, curve_circle, resample_curve
node_helpers.py: Updated switch_node body to use link_or_set for sw input (was direct links.new)
exporter.py: Fixed prop_args quoting — non-string types (bool, int, float) now use repr() instead of string quotes
Updated get_attr callers: recreate_mesh_curve.py, charrot_gregory_patch.py, store_attr_on_points.py, coon_patch.py, cache_bezier.py
